GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is selected when customers need reminders or assistance with submitting pending documents for their loan applications.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the query is about pending document submissions, use the Slack__SendMessageToSlackChannel action to notify the customer.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only send automated reminders for pending document submissions. You are not able to review submitted documents or provide feedback on their content.
